meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS pricing to Solve no marketing skills
content.seo_description: Learn how to use AI-driven SaaS pricing to overcome a lack of marketing skills. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to win; you need a pricing strategy that sells itself. By leveraging Antigravity to model value-based tiers and Claude Code to implement automated billing logic, you can turn your SaaS into a high-converting machine that justifies its own existence through clear, data-backed ROI.
content.intro:
The screen glows with your latest build, a masterpiece of logic and architecture. But the silence is deafening. You’ve shipped a high-performance SaaS, yet the checkout page remains a ghost town because you’re a builder, not a marketer. The 'no marketing skills' wall is the graveyard of a thousand brilliant projects.

But here is the secret: pricing is the ultimate marketing hack. When your pricing model aligns perfectly with user value, the product sells itself. We are moving away from gut-feeling numbers to a systematic, AI-assisted framework that forces your SaaS to communicate its own value proposition to the right users.

steps.title: Define Your Value Metric
steps.description: Identify the primary unit of value your SaaS provides. If you can't measure it, you can't price it. We use AI to extract this from your codebase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my codebase and identify the core resource usage metric that correlates most directly to user value (e.g., API calls, storage, seats). Suggest three tiered pricing models based on this metric.

steps.title: Model Tiered Pricing Logic
steps.description: Structure your tiers to capture maximum surplus from power users while remaining accessible to beginners.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a JSON schema for a three-tier subscription model: Starter, Pro, and Enterprise. Include logic for feature gates based on the identified value metric.

steps.title: Implement Stripe Integration
steps.description: Automate the billing workflow so you never have to manually invoice a client again.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a TypeScript service for Stripe integration that handles subscription creation and updates based on the pricing.json schema.

steps.title: Automate Value-Based Upsells
steps.description: Use your pricing logic to trigger automated emails or in-app nudges when a user nears their limit.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a background worker that monitors user usage and triggers an 'upgrade to Pro' alert when they reach 80% of their current tier capacity.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Deploy the pricing infrastructure and run a smoke test to ensure the billing flow is frictionless.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a set of integration tests to verify that billing tiers update correctly when usage thresholds are met.

pro_tips: Never price based on cost; price based on the time or money you save the client.
Always include a 'Contact Us' option for high-tier plans to create a sales conversation channel.
Use 'decoy pricing'—make your middle tier look like the obvious, high-value choice compared to the others.
Implement automated dunning emails to recover failed payments without manual intervention.
Keep your pricing table simple; if a user has to think for more than five seconds, they will leave.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing is live, set up a simple analytics dashboard to track conversion rates per tier. Iterate on your pricing every 30 days based on user feedback and actual usage data.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your technical genius go to waste because of a lack of marketing strategy. By building your pricing into the DNA of your app, you create a sustainable, scalable business that grows while you sleep. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
